description.ru: Технический портал для разработчиков, администраторов, интеграторов и специалистов по безопасности.
description.en: A technical portal for developers, operators, integrators and security specialists.

text.ru: Портал описывает current main. SemVer подставляется из корневого package.json; действующая линия использует Application API v3, Trust/MLS/encrypted-media API v4 и SQLite schema 8.
text.en: The portal describes current main. SemVer is injected from the root package.json; the active line uses Application API v3, Trust/MLS/encrypted-media API v4 and SQLite schema 8.

text.ru: 3.3.x публикуется как UNSIGNED-TEST prerelease. Независимый security-аудит и защита от traffic analysis не заявляются.
text.en: 3.3.x is published as an UNSIGNED-TEST prerelease. No independent security audit or traffic-analysis resistance is claimed.

ru: Разработчики и contributors, изучающие модули и quality gates.
Операторы Local Server, отвечающие за HTTPS, backup, monitoring и restore.
REST/Socket.IO, bot, webhook и Pulse integrators.
Security reviewers, анализирующие Trust boundaries, MLS и residual risks.
en: Developers and contributors studying modules and quality gates.
Local Server operators responsible for HTTPS, backup, monitoring and restore.
REST/Socket.IO, bot, webhook and Pulse integrators.
Security reviewers analysing trust boundaries, MLS and residual risks.

text.ru: Текущий код, tests, PROJECT_INDEX, ARCHITECTURE и SECURITY_MODEL имеют приоритет. Documentation Kit от 17 июля 2026 года основан на 0.3.0 и используется только как исторический аудит и provenance целевых требований.
text.en: Current source, tests, PROJECT_INDEX, ARCHITECTURE and SECURITY_MODEL take precedence. The Documentation Kit dated 17 July 2026 is based on 0.3.0 and is used only as historical audit material and target-requirement provenance.

description.ru: Минимальный проверяемый запуск Local Server и клиента.
description.en: A minimal verifiable Local Server and Client startup.

ru: Node.js 22.16+ и npm.
Записываемый data directory и свободное место для SQLite/WAL, attachments и backups.
HTTPS с корректным SAN/fingerprint вне localhost.
en: Node.js 22.16+ and npm.
A writable data directory and free space for SQLite/WAL, attachments and backups.
HTTPS with correct SAN/fingerprint outside localhost.

ru: Зафиксируйте HTTPS URL, Server ID и SHA-256 fingerprint.
Проверьте GET /healthz/live и GET /healthz/ready.
Подтвердите schema 8, integrity и доступное хранилище.
Передайте URL, Server ID и fingerprint по доверенному каналу.
Подключите Client и проверьте bootstrap-before-Trust.
en: Record the HTTPS URL, Server ID and SHA-256 fingerprint.
Verify GET /healthz/live and GET /healthz/ready.
Confirm schema 8, integrity and available storage.
Share URL, Server ID and fingerprint over a trusted channel.
Connect the Client and verify bootstrap-before-Trust.

text.ru: Electron закрепляет fingerprint за Server ID; Browser/PWA/Android используют системное доверие сертификатам.
text.en: Electron pins the fingerprint to Server ID; Browser/PWA/Android use the operating-system trust store.

rows.ru: Updater требует полный подписанный asset set
rows.en: Updater requires a complete signed asset set
Uses the system TLS trust store

text.ru: UNSIGNED-TEST assets не подключаются к production updater автоматически. Подтверждённая signed baseline — 3.1.2.
text.en: UNSIGNED-TEST assets are not connected automatically to the production updater. The confirmed signed baseline is 3.1.2.

description.ru: TLS, origins, storage, Pulse и operational settings.
description.en: TLS, origins, storage, Pulse and operational settings.

ru: Точный allowedOrigins; wildcard для credentialed browser requests запрещён.
NEXORA_METRICS_TOKEN для remote metrics; без token endpoint остаётся loopback-only.
Secrets только в environment/secret store; не в repository, logs или audit metadata.
Production Pulse использует отдельный Cloud authority; sandbox не создаёт production entitlements.
en: Exact allowedOrigins; wildcard is forbidden for credentialed browser requests.
NEXORA_METRICS_TOKEN for remote metrics; without a token the endpoint remains loopback-only.
Secrets only in environment/secret storage, never repository, logs or audit metadata.
Production Pulse uses a separate Cloud authority; sandbox cannot create production entitlements.

ru: Проверьте writable storage и free space.
Проверьте certificate SAN и fingerprint.
Запустите integrity/schema readiness.
Подтвердите maintenance scheduler и expected Pulse mode.
en: Check writable storage and free space.
Check certificate SAN and fingerprint.
Verify integrity/schema readiness.
Confirm the maintenance scheduler and expected Pulse mode.

ru: Trusted HTTPS reverse proxy и restricted firewall exposure.
Exact origins, protected OS account, disk encryption и off-host backup.
Не пробрасывайте Local Server port напрямую в Internet.
LAN/VPN membership не является trust; authorization выполняется для каждого действия.
en: Trusted HTTPS reverse proxy and restricted firewall exposure.
Exact origins, protected OS account, disk encryption and off-host backup.
Do not forward the Local Server port directly to the Internet.
LAN/VPN membership is not trust; authorization is enforced for every action.

ru: Проверьте live/ready и protected metrics.
Проверьте login/bootstrap, legacy и secure messaging.
Проверьте Trust enrollment, Welcome recovery и revoke disconnect.
Создайте verified backup и выполните restore drill.
Зафиксируйте release tag, commit, schema и artifact classification.
en: Verify live/ready and protected metrics.
Verify login/bootstrap, legacy and secure messaging.
Verify Trust enrollment, Welcome recovery and revoke disconnect.
Create a verified backup and perform a restore drill.
Record release tag, commit, schema and artifact classification.
